name: Spring 2026 Trend Report — Jazz Age Drop-Waist
why: The drop-waist midi dress trend is so romantic and feminine. The Nina Ricci slip dress is gorgeous but way out of my budget — but the silhouette itself is something I can find at Zara or H&M. Soft floral prints, relaxed 1920s shapes, that feeling of old-world elegance mixed with modern ease. This is the kind of dress I'd wear to a summer market or a brunch date.
